level_signals: First human touchpoint for high-volume inbound; described as a stepping stone into Account Executive roles
Requires only 'previous academic, work and/or internship experience'
6 months+ BDR experience listed as a plus, not required
Base pay range $23.08–$34.62/hr consistent with entry-level US sales role

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have previous academic, work and/or internship experience with some transferable skills (sales, customer service, support, retail, hospitality, etc.)
Excited, motivated, and inspired by exceeding goals and continuously learning
Experience or the ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-volume environment
Detail-oriented with strong time management and prioritization skills
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Excellent interpersonal and customer service skills; you enjoy talking to customers and helping them make decisions
Proficient with Google Suite and Microsoft Office Suite or related software

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6 months+ experience in business development is a plus, but not required
CRM proficiency (Salesforce or similar) is a plus

scope.surface: Inbound demo requests and free Klaviyo accounts; smallest accounts from first touch through purchase
scope.business_model: SaaS / PLG + sales-assisted; ecommerce marketing platform
core_responsibilities: Field inbound demand (demos, trials, free accounts, and product inquiries) via phone, email, and other channels
Run consultative, decision-driven demos focused on one-call closes whenever possible for smaller opportunities
Do targeted business discovery to understand goals, urgency, and fit
Qualify in or out efficiently, so you know where to double-down and where to quickly move on
Own and work a high-velocity pipeline, using strong prioritization and time management to maximize new logo acquisition
Drive new logo acquisition as a primary objective
Contribute to broader Growth team goals across free-to-paid conversion, logo count, ADS, and other core growth metrics
Consult with customers to advise and design solutions based on ecommerce best practices and optimal utilization of Klaviyo's platform
Conduct consultative qualification of prospects, and provide demonstrations of the platform
Collaborate cross-functionally to improve overall customer experience and create a structured feedback loop

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of total compensation package

green_flags: Explicitly encourages close-but-not-exact-match applicants to apply
Clear career progression path described (stepping stone to AE and other GTM roles)
Role sits within Marketing/Growth org with clear cross-functional partnerships
Equity and bonus mentioned as part of total comp package
red_flags: Location/work-model not specified in JD body — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite
Hourly pay range is broad ($23.08–$34.62) and explicitly varies by geography, so actual offer may land far from midpoint
Use of Covey AI screening tool disclosed; independent bias audit mentioned but warrants review

scope.business_model (inferred from product description and ecommerce context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; partially named in JD as 'free-to-paid conversion, logo count, ADS')
